sessions.name: ZA Support V1 — Full Health Check Software
sessions.description: Comprehensive support platform for paying and SLA clients: ticketing, real-time chat, user management, dashboard, and health-check monitoring

sessions.name: ZA Support V3 — Diagnostic Software
sessions.description: Lightweight diagnostic agent that supports the V1 platform: machine health telemetry, network monitoring
